name: superdev
description: Superdev — a workspace-scope-agnostic, package-manager-agnostic, self-improving Claude Code plugin bundling 11 skills and 43 subagents for full-stack monorepo builds (PRD+design orchestration, design-to-Next.js / design-preservation, Nest.js backend, security, prototype-to-SaaS migration, exploratory QA, systematic-debugging, product-completeness-audit, brutal-exhaustive-audit, superdev-self-learning).

plugins.name: superdev
plugins.description: 11 production-grade skills + 43 specialized subagents for full-stack monorepo builds. Workspace-scope and package-manager agnostic. Self-improving: writes .claude/memory/superdev-learned/ entries from user-frustration signals (corrections, code reverts, verifier rejections, design drift) and threads them into every future dispatch so the system stops repeating mistakes. Skills: prd-design-build-orchestrator, design-to-nextjs, design-preservation, nestjs-enterprise-backend, security-review-and-fix, prototype-to-saas, exploratory-qa, systematic-debugging, product-completeness-audit, brutal-exhaustive-audit, superdev-self-learning.
